title: Skills registry
description: Per-scope skill registry. A skills.json lives in a scope directory (any dir with an AGENTS.md). Two record kinds: a DECLARATION introduces a skill that lives in this scope's skills/ folder (no `from` — the folder is its home scope); an OVERRIDE (`from` set) sets the effective tier of a skill declared in another scope. Resolution walks the connected scope chain shallow->deep, deepest wins. A declaration contributes its tier only if `force` is true or the connecting user is its `owner`; an override always contributes (including `off` to opt out). Absence of any contribution = off.

$schema.description: Path or URL to this schema, for editor autocomplete and validation.

owner.description: Declarations: who added the skill — the person to ask before changing or removing it, and whose connection auto-enables it. Metadata, not access control. For external skills it is also the discriminator (the source author). Required on declarations and on external overrides; unused on in-tree overrides.

tier.description: always: full description auto-loaded, invokable via the agent's Skill primitive. optional: listed in the optional-skills index, SKILL.md read on demand. unlisted: registered and invocable by name, but not surfaced in any auto-loaded index. off: shadow/disable (overrides only). Declarations recommend always|optional|unlisted; overrides set the effective tier and may also use off to opt out.

force.description: Declarations only; default false. false => the declared tier reaches only the owner. true => it reaches everyone whose chain includes the skill's home scope (a deliberate, reviewed decision to share — the loud name is the social gate). Overridable: a deeper override still wins.

from.description: Overrides only. The home scope of the skill being overridden — its repo-relative scope path (e.g. 'groups/acme'), 'global', or 'external'. The presence of `from` is what marks an entry as an override rather than a declaration.

source.description: Declarations only, required for external skills. Where to fetch the skill from. Only the scope that declares the external skill carries source; overrides reference it by from='external' + name + owner.

repo.description: GitHub HTTPS URL of the source repository.

path.description: Path within the repo to the skill directory.

ref.description: Pinned git ref — commit SHA, tag, or branch.

agent.description: Load only when connect-agent.sh runs for this agent (e.g. 'claude'). Mutually exclusive with skipAgents.

skipAgents.description: Load for every agent except those listed. Mutually exclusive with agent.

notes.description: Free-form notes for humans reviewing the entry.

reviewed_by.description: Username of the person who vetted an external source repo.
